title: aira cespitosa var. pallescens
intro: Aira cespitosa var. pallescens, also known as pale hair grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Europe and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Aira cespitosa var. pallescens can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
